feed.title: AI-bridge
feed.subtitle: Combined AI feed: Thinking Machines, Ollama, Mistral, Interconnected, AI Clock, Glama (blog + release notes + MCP servers), Perplexity (blog/changelog/research/API changelog), The Batch / DeepLearning.AI, and Groq (blog/newsroom/changelog).

entry.title: The unauthorized tool call problem
entry.content: \ | done Getting requirements to build wheel ... done Preparing metadata (pyproject.toml) ... done Requirement already satisfied: anyio=4.5 in /usr/local/lib/python3.12/site-packages (from mcp==1.25.1.dev70+4a2d83a) (4.12.1) Requirement already satisfied: httpx-sse=0.4 in /app/data/.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages (from mcp==1.25.1.dev70+4a2d83a) (0.4.3) Requirement already satisfied: httpx=0.27.1 in /usr/local/lib/python3.12/site-packages (from mcp==1.25.1.dev70+4a2d83a) (0.28.1) Require

entry.title: Generic MCP Server for Google Workspace
entry.content: Generic MCP Server for Google Workspace

entry.title: Apify Google Local Services API MCP Server
entry.content: Apify Google Local Services API MCP Server

entry.title: The Future Worth Building Is Human
entry.content: The mission of Thinking Machines is to build AI that extends human will and judgment. Artificial intelligence can do more every day, but deciding what it should do is up to us: individuals, organizations, humanity as a whole. These decisions require knowledge and judgment that people acquire through continuous contact with the work, increasingly done alongside AI. Shaping the goals of advanced intelligence is also a continuous process of feedback, learning, and realignment. Most AI in use today

entry.title: June 2026
entry.content: Agent API: New Models The Agent API expanded model coverage this month, all with direct first-party token pricing. See the full list in the Agent API Models reference . Claude Sonnet 5 — anthropic/claude-sonnet-5 , Anthropic's latest Sonnet model. GLM 5.2 — perplexity/glm-5.2 , Z.AI's flagship reasoning model. Kimi K2.7 Code — perplexity/kimi-k2.7-code , Moonshot AI's coding and agentic model. Nemotron 3 Super — nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b , NVIDIA's open-weight reasoning model.

entry.title: Your Prompts and Skills need a system of record.
entry.content: Studio provides a system of record for AI prompts and skills—versioned, owned, and traceable. Iterate fast, ship with control, and ensure consistent AI behavior.

entry.title: Ollama: all aboard open models
entry.content: Serving 8.9 million developers, Ollama has raised $88M from Benchmark, Theory Ventures, 8VC, Y Combinator, and many incredible angel investors.

entry.title: July 2026
entry.content: Agent API: Grok 4.5 Support The Agent API now supports xai/grok-4.5 , xAI's flagship coding and agentic model, with direct first-party token pricing. See the full list in the Agent API Models reference .

entry.title: Introducing Robostral Navigate
entry.content: Introducing Robostral Navigate: 8B model achieving 76.6% on R2R-CE with just a single RGB camera. No depth sensors, LiDAR, or multiple cameras needed.

entry.title: Factories are just rooms
entry.content: I went into my kid’s school a couple months back and spoke to the year group about manufacturing. Honestly it was the most rewarding speaking gig I’ve done all year. It was about the process of making my AI clock and I have a ton of pics from my factory visit to Shenzhen (mostly pics that I have only shared with Kickstarter backers). I talked about where ideas come from and the value of playing around, and how it’s neat to learn new techniques that you can combine together. I talked about protot

entry.title: Your AI Chatbot Just Exposed Your CEO's Salary to an Intern
entry.content: An HR chatbot leaks the CEO's salary to an intern, no jailbreak required. WSO2's Sahan Dilshan and Hasini Samarathunga break down why agent-only and user-only tokens both fail, and how on-behalf-of (OBO) delegation fixes the confused deputy problem in MCP.

entry.title: Why MCP Servers Need Execution Sandboxing (And Why Your Current Stack Isn't Enough)
entry.content: Three real MCP breaches: "GitHub" , "CVE-2025-6514" , "Microsoft Research" - share the same root cause: no hard execution boundary. This blog breaks down why IAM and Docker fall short for agentic workloads, and how WebAssembly + WASI's three core primitives (linear memory isolation, fuel counting, WASI pre-opens) solve the problem that your current security stack can't.

entry.title: Faster Gemma 4 on MLX with multi-token prediction
entry.content: Gemma 4 is now significantly faster in Ollama 0.31 on Apple Silicon via multi-token prediction (MTP), powered by MLX. Performance is now up to 90% faster when used with coding agents, as measured using the Aider polyglot benchmark.

entry.title: Filtered for that which motivates form
entry.content: 1. It’s hot in London so I’ve been seeing a lot of handheld portable fans, usually with a strap so you can hang it round your neck. My faves are the ones with thermoelectric coolers in the middle of the fan: a small plate that is so cold that it is covered with icy condensation. It’s the Peltier effect (the plate is really hot on the back) and the first time I’ve seen a thermoelectric cooler in the wild. Here’s a thermoelectric handheld fan on Alibaba . Three quid each if you’re buying over a mi

entry.title: Bringing more control over your connectors
entry.content: Bringing more control over your connectors

entry.title: Introducing Computer for Counsel
entry.content: Computer for Counsel connects legal research, document, and contract tools so lawyers spend less time on admin work.

entry.title: Introducing Mistral OCR 4
entry.content: Mistral OCR 4 delivers enterprise document AI with 170-language support, bounding boxes, and self-hosted deployment.

entry.title: Groq Raises $650M to Scale Its AI Inference Cloud Business
entry.content: Groq Raises $650M to Scale Its AI Inference Cloud Business

entry.title: I am obsessed with these two ads
entry.content: I didn’t know what a near-infrared LED mask was a week ago, and now I am obsessed with this ad from Omnilux. Because there’s a lot going on. The aesthetic of the mask itself is wild: the lines look like sinews as if the woman has been flensed But the schematic flesh is commercial! The logo on the forehead! Yet she has glossy hair and a spa outfit And is drinking a glass of white wine?? Let’s not get into the red glow through the holes in the face The ad copy is tight af, no messing around: retai

entry.title: Deep Research, command panel, and enterprise controls - June 19, 2026
entry.content: Deep Research, command panel, and enterprise controls - June 19, 2026

entry.title: Self-improving Memory for Agents
entry.content: Brain is Perplexity's self-improving memory system for Computer that learns from past work to deliver faster, more accurate results over time.

entry.title: Wet thoughts
entry.content: Wet lab. “Wet lab” was a new term to me, I had to look it up – it’s a laboratory with chemicals where there’s spill risk etc. I have a physics background myself and the closest I came to liquids was liquid nitrogen, and when you spill that it just boils furiously and goes away. Don’t do this: if you put your open hand into a dewar of liquid nitrogen, you can hold it under the liquid at -196C/-320F because the boiling on the surface of your hand makes an insulating quilt. It’s a fun game. Closing

entry.title: Introducing Perplexity Pages
entry.content: A new way to create and share knowledge on Perplexity

entry.title: Disaggregated Prefill and Decode
entry.content: Separating prefill and decode across devices speeds up LLM inference and improves performance

entry.title: Computer for Professional Finance
entry.content: Today we are launching Perplexity Computer for Professional Finance, a version of Computer built for the research, analysis, and decision workflows finance teams run every day.

entry.title: Introducing Finance Search in the Agent API
entry.content: Today we're launching Finance Search in the Perplexity Agent API. In a single tool call, Finance Search combines licensed financial datasets, real-time market data, and cited web sources.

entry.title: How We Built Security Into Computer
entry.content: Perplexity Computer is built directly on Perplexity's existing infrastructure, which has completed its 2026 SOC 2 Type II attestation, and inherits Perplexity’s enterprise security features such as SAML SSO, audit logs, and granular administrative controls.

entry.title: How Computer is Reshaping Knowledge Work
entry.content: This week, in collaboration with researchers at Harvard Business School, we published a new study looking at how people actually use Perplexity Computer in the real world.

entry.title: Deep Research, now in Computer
entry.content: Deep Research in Computer answers hard questions with trusted data, then delivers reports, dashboards, and decks.

entry.title: Ollama's highest performance on Apple Silicon yet with MLX
entry.content: Ollama's MLX engine has been updated to deliver its highest performance on Apple Silicon yet. Models output higher quality responses, respond faster, and use less memory.

entry.title: Bringing European AI Models to Global Audiences
entry.content: Perplexity will integrate sovereign European AI models into our answer engine, bringing locally-optimized, culturally-aware AI to users worldwide while supporting Europe's digital sovereignty initiatives.

entry.title: Book a Table with Perplexity and OpenTable
entry.content: Book your next dining experience effortlessly with Perplexity’s new OpenTable partnership.

entry.title: How We Built Security Into Comet From Day One
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: What Is an AI Employee? How to Hire One in 2026 An AI employee is a persistent AI agent that holds a defined role, runs autonomously 24/7, and handles real business tasks. Learn what separates an AI e

entry.title: Hosting Qwen on Blackwell
entry.content: Perplexity Research advances our mission to transform how we navigate the internet and the wider world through frontier research in search, reasoning, agents, and systems.

entry.title: Query-Aware Context Compression for Better Snippets
entry.content: Improving the quality-efficiency frontier of model context through query-aware context compression models.

entry.title: Improving Unigram Tokenizer CPU Performance
entry.content: We reimplemented our Unigram tokenizer from scratch as a focused performance project.

entry.title: Rethinking Search as Code Generation
entry.content: Evolving search from monolithic services to programmable primitives for the era of agent harnesses.

entry.title: How AI Agents Reshape Knowledge Work
entry.content: Computer raises task autonomy, lowers cost, and widens the scope of work users take on.

entry.title: Self-driving legs to walk me to the office
entry.content: When we end up voluntarily ceding control of our own body parts to AI (for example so we can automatically walk around the grocery story while simultaneously catching up on boxsets on a VR headset) I wonder what that will feel like. The underlying tech is currently in research phase. What I mean is that humanoid robots are coming (as previously discussed). And while robots are a mechanical challenge and a software challenge, some people are asking: what if you took that software part and pointed

entry.title: Improved performance and model support with GGUF
entry.content: Ollama 0.30 is now available with improved performance and GGUF model compatibility through llama.cpp. This augments Ollama's MLX engine on Apple silicon, bringing support to more models on a wider range of hardware.

entry.title: Introducing the Perplexity Publishers’ Program
entry.content: From day one, we’ve included citations in each answer, ensuring publishers receive proper credit and building user trust.

entry.title: Efficient and Portable Mixture-of-Experts Communication
entry.content: An overview of portable Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) communication, focusing on optimizing GPU parallelism and reducing latency in large-scale AI models

entry.title: Introducing Comet: Browse at the speed of thought
entry.content: Comet is a web browser built for today’s internet. In the last 30 years, the internet has evolved from something we simply “browse” or “search.” The internet is where we live, work, and connect.

entry.title: Secure Credentials on Comet with 1Password
entry.content: Perplexity Partners with 1Password in First AI Browser Partnership for Password Security

entry.title: The New Comet Assistant
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: Finish Your Annual Plan Faster With Perplexity
entry.content: Use Perplexity to turn messy annual planning into a fast, focused system your team can actually execute.

entry.title: Introducing the Perplexity Health Advisory Board
entry.content: The Perplexity Health Advisory Board is a small group of practicing physicians, researchers, and health technology leaders who will help ensure that our future product decisions, content quality, patient safety, and clinical workflows reflect evidence-based medicine.

entry.title: Computer at Work
entry.content: Last month, we launched Computer for Enterprise. At Ask NYC 2026, our inaugural enterprise conference, we shared what's next: more integrations, data connectors, and workflow tools built around how enterprise teams actually work

entry.title: Computer comes to Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook
entry.content: Perplexity Computer runs inside Microsoft 365 apps. Draft docs, build models, generate decks, and compose email in-app.

entry.title: Perplexity Pro is coming to all SK Telecom users
entry.content: We’re teaming up with the global telecommunications company and largest mobile network in Korea to expand access to 32.5 million new users.

entry.title: Meet our First Channel Partners & Data Integrators
entry.content: Expanding our footprint for Enterprise Pro by partnering with industry leaders

entry.title: Perplexity’s Fall 2024 Campus Strategist Program
entry.content: Here’s how our 2024 Campus Strategists brought AI search to life through hackathons, events, and innovative outreach.

entry.title: Perplexity Expands Partnership with SoftBank to Launch Enterprise Pro Japan
entry.content: Perplexity partners with SoftBank to bring Enterprise Pro to Japanese corporations.

entry.title: Perplexity x Lewis Hamilton
entry.content: Today we’re announcing a global partnership between Perplexity and Lewis Hamilton - a collaboration that brings together the relentless pursuit of speed, precision, and curiosity.

entry.title: Perplexity x Theo Von’s This Past Weekend
entry.content: Today we’re announcing a new partnership with The Roost Podcast Network and Theo Von’s hit show, “This Past Weekend.” Our partnership pairs one of the world’s most famously inquisitive minds with the AI-powered answer engine built for people who are curious.

entry.title: Introducing Perplexity for Government
entry.content: An initiative that centralizes and expands our efforts to serve those who serve America

entry.title: A Personal Assistant for Your Inbox
entry.content: Today we're launching Perplexity Email Assistant, exclusive for Perplexity Max subscribers. Email Assistant brings a powerful personal assistant to your email, transforming your inbox to action.

entry.title: Shopping That Puts You First
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: Introducing Perplexity Computer
entry.content: Perplexity Computer unifies every current AI capability into a single system. Computer is a general-purpose digital worker that operates the same interfaces you do.

entry.title: Sandbox API: Isolated Code Execution for AI Agents
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: Perplexity APIs Power AI Browsing on Samsung Devices
entry.content: This week, Samsung launched Browsing Assist, a conversational AI assistant built directly into Samsung Browser on Galaxy Android devices and Windows PC, reaching up to 1 billion Samsung devices. Perplexity built the APIs that power it.

entry.title: Introducing Computer for Taxes
entry.content: Computer for Taxes answers U.S. tax questions fast and accurately, drafting returns and reviewing for compliance

entry.title: Personal Computer is Coming to Windows
entry.content: Computer for Windows acts on local files, orchestrates Microsoft apps, and works across the web.

entry.title: Personal Computer Is Here
entry.content: Personal Computer brings the multi-model orchestration of Computer to your machine, working across files, apps, and the web.

entry.title: Perplexity raises Series A funding round
entry.content: Announcing Perplexity's Series A Funding Round and Mobile App Launch

entry.title: Introducing pplx-api
entry.content: Perplexity Lab's fast and efficient API for open-source LLMs

entry.title: Turbocharging Llama 2 70B with NVIDIA H100
entry.content: The journey of accelerated LLM inference

entry.title: Perplexity raises Series B funding round

entry.title: Arc x Perplexity
entry.content: A new internet deserves a new window.

entry.title: Perplexity Partners with ElevenLabs to launch 'Discover Daily' Podcast
entry.content: Bringing cutting-edge knowledge to your ears

entry.title: Perplexity launches Enterprise Pro
entry.content: Announces $62.7M in funding and partnerships with SoftBank + Deutsche Telekom

entry.title: Bringing Perplexity to education and not-for-profits
entry.content: Perplexity Enterprise Pro, with special rates for philanthropic organizations, public servants, and schools

entry.title: Pro Search: Upgraded for more advanced problem-solving
entry.content: Research shapes our daily lives. We use it to make informed decisions and solve problems—to innovate, learn, and grow.

entry.title: Perplexity collaborates with Amazon Web Services to launch Enterprise Pro
entry.content: We’re taking another major step in giving organizations the ability to leverage AI-powered tools for greater efficiency and productivity.

entry.title: Eligible Uber One members can now unlock a complimentary full year of Perplexity Pro
entry.content: Uber One members can now save even more time with perks like Pro Search

entry.title: Perplexity makes gift to Northwestern Medill to research AI and journalism
entry.content: Our $250K gift to Northwestern Medill supports cutting-edge research on AI's role in journalism, exploring how our technology can enhance reporting, fact-checking, and news consumption in the digital age.

entry.title: Redeem a free year of Perplexity Pro through Xfinity Rewards
entry.content: Perplexity is thrilled to offer Perplexity Pro—our premium consumer subscription—to Xfinity customers through its customer loyalty program

entry.title: Getting started with Perplexity
entry.content: Perplexity is an AI search engine that delivers fast, clear answers with real-time insights. Get reliable information without sifting through endless links.

entry.title: Introducing Internal Knowledge Search and Spaces
entry.content: Enhanced file analysis and collaboration features on Perplexity

entry.title: A student's guide to using Perplexity Spaces
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: Introducing the Election Information Hub
entry.content: Understand key issues, vote intelligently, and track election results all on Perplexity.

entry.title: Why we’re experimenting with advertising
entry.content: Users come to Perplexity for a more efficient, uncluttered, and unbiased search experience, and that isn’t changing.

entry.title: Research nonprofits with Charity Navigator on Perplexity
entry.content: Today is Giving Tuesday, and we're making it easier than ever to research and donate to U.S. nonprofits thanks to a new collaboration with Charity Navigator.

entry.title: Perplexity Expands Publisher Program with 15 New Media Partners
entry.content: Perplexity added major media companies to its publisher revenue-sharing program, including the Los Angeles Times, The Independent, and ADWEEK12. The expansion brings diverse content partners across multiple regions and specialties, from local news to specialized publications

entry.title: Welcoming Carbon to the Perplexity Team
entry.content: We're excited to announce that we've acquired Carbon, a retrieval engine that connects external data sources to large language models.

entry.title: Introducing the Sonar Pro API by Perplexity
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: High-Performance GPU Memory Transfer on AWS Sagemaker Hyperpod
Meet New Sonar
entry.content: A Blazing Fast Model Optimized for Perplexity Search

entry.title: Introducing Perplexity Deep Research
entry.content: Deep Research accelerates question answering by completing in 2-4 minutes what would take a human expert many hours.

entry.title: Improved Sonar Models: Industry Leading Performance at Lower Costs
entry.content: New tiered search modes balance cost and performance, delivering superior results at the best price

entry.title: Rebuilding TikTok in America
entry.content: A Vision for Rebuilding TikTok in America

entry.title: Perplexity Sonar Dominates New Search Arena Evaluation
entry.content: Perplexity Sonar models claim top spots in search evaluation

entry.title: How Perplexity Enterprise Pro Keeps Your Data Secure
entry.content: With advanced privacy protections, admin controls, and compliance-ready infrastructure, Enterprise Pro provides your team with a powerful answer engine and deep research tools for the web and internal files while keeping your data private and secure.

entry.title: Lower Latency and Higher Throughput with Multi-node DeepSeek Deployment
entry.content: Multi-GPU deployment boosts MoE model performance on both speed and scale fronts simultaneously

entry.title: Choice is the Remedy
entry.content: At Perplexity, we don’t see ourselves as a competitor to Google. We’re building something different. We're giving people a choice: search that answers, assistants that work. AI that's intelligent, accurate, and trustworthy.

entry.title: Announcing Our Global Partnership with Motorola
entry.content: We're excited to announce our global partnership with Motorola. Starting with the new generation of Motorola devices, Perplexity will be pre-installed on millions of smartphones worldwide, giving Motorola users direct access to our answer engine and assistant.

entry.title: RL Training For Math Reasoning
entry.content: Boosting Math Reasoning in LLMs with Reinforcement Learning and Smart Data Mixing

entry.title: Perplexity Partners with Wiley to Power Educational AI Search
entry.content: Perplexity is partnering with Wiley, one of the world’s largest publishers and trusted leader in research and learning to combine our answer engine with their extensive library of scientific, technical and medical learning materials.

entry.title: Perplexity and SAP: Turbocharging Joule with Real-Time Answers for Every Enterprise
entry.content: Perplexity has teamed up with SAP to integrate its AI-powered answer engine into SAP Joule, providing businesses with instant, context-driven insights to enhance decision-making with real-time, secure data.

entry.title: More Value In Every Answer: New Benefits For Every Level of Perplexity User
entry.content: Perplexity Pro Perks gives Pro users special deals and offers from top brands in travel, health, finance, and more. These offers are built right into Perplexity, so Pro members can easily access them as part of their subscription.

entry.title: Introducing Perplexity Labs
entry.content: Perplexity Labs are a way to bring your projects to life faster than ever before

entry.title: Answers for Every Investor
entry.content: All investors share one thing: curiosity.

entry.title: Accelerating Sonar Through Speculation
entry.content: Speculative decoding accelerates Sonar LLMs via draft model verification

entry.title: Introducing Perplexity Max
entry.content: Our most advanced subscription tier yet, built for those who demand limitless AI productivity and immediate access to the newest products and features from Perplexity.

entry.title: Welcoming Gannett to the Perplexity Publisher Program
entry.content: Gannett (USA TODAY + 200 local outlets) licenses content to Perplexity, enriching its AI search and Comet browser with trusted journalism while adopting Sonar API and Enterprise Pro.

entry.title: Agents or Bots? Making Sense of AI on the Open Web
entry.content: Modern AI assistants work fundamentally differently from traditional web crawling.

entry.title: GPT-OSS on Day 0
entry.content: Day‑0 support for GPT‑OSS on H200 by adapting ROSE with FP8, sink attention, and MoE optimizations

entry.title: The Intelligent Business: Introducing Comet for Enterprise Pro
entry.content: Yesterday we launched Comet to all US Perplexity Pro subscribers. Today we are shipping Comet to all Perplexity Enterprise Pro users.

entry.title: Introducing Comet Plus
entry.content: Comet Plus is a new subscription that gives Perplexity users access to premium content from a group of trusted publishers and journalists.

entry.title: Power your organization’s full potential
entry.content: Today, we're excited to announce Perplexity Enterprise Max, our most advanced tier that combines all the advanced capabilities of Max with the enterprise-grade security and controls that organizations demand.

entry.title: Introducing the Perplexity Search API
entry.content: Providing access to the same global-scale infrastructure that powers Perplexity’s public answer engine

entry.title: Announcing Comet Plus Launch Partners
entry.content: Delivering premium journalism to a more curious, empowered internet while ensuring that publishers benefit too

entry.title: The Internet is Better on Comet
entry.content: Today we are releasing the Comet browser to the world, for free.

entry.title: Mitigating Prompt Injection in Comet
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: AI at work: getting more done with less hype
entry.content: Our view of AI is pretty simple: the most powerful application of AI is for it to be useful to people.

entry.title: Introducing Perplexity Patents: AI-Powered Patent Search for Everyone
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: Introducing Privacy Snapshot
entry.content: Comet is the world’s first browser built from the ground up to be an AI assistant. Knowing we were building one of the first AI browsers and powerful personal assistants, we designed Comet to have privacy and security at the core.

entry.title: Bullying is Not Innovation
entry.content: The point of technology is to make life better for people. We call it innovation, but it’s just the constant process of asking how to make things better. Bullying, on the other hand, is when large corporations use legal threats and intimidation to block innovation and make life worse for people.

entry.title: Comet Assistant puts you in control
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: Introducing AI assistants with memory
entry.content: With our upgraded personalization and memory, Perplexity remembers key details across conversations so future answers are more personalized and efficient.

entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.content: Today we are announcing that Perplexity has entered a global partnership with Cristiano Ronaldo.

entry.title: Introducing Perplexity for Public Safety Organizations
entry.content: Perplexity is now the first frontier AI company to offer Enterprise Pro specifically to law enforcement and public safety agencies.

entry.title: Happy 25th Birthday, Wikipedia
entry.content: Twenty-five years ago today, Wikipedia launched with a simple idea: that wisdom is everywhere, and technology should help more people access it.

entry.title: Inside the Rise of Enterprise AI Model-Switching
entry.content: Enterprise usage data shows employees are now treating models as a menu of options, not a single default tool.

entry.title: Introducing Model Council
entry.content: Today we are launching Model Council, a multi-model research feature that brings several models together for one answer.

entry.title: The AI is the Computer
entry.content: Explore Perplexity's blog for articles, announcements, product updates, and tips to optimize your experience. Stay informed and make the most of Perplexity.

entry.title: Everything is Computer
entry.content: Today we are announcing Personal Computer.  Personal Computer runs on a dedicated Mac mini that can run 24/7, connected to your local apps and Perplexity’s secure servers.

entry.title: Agent API: A Managed Runtime for Agentic Workflows
entry.content: Today we are releasing the Perplexity Agent API, a managed runtime for building agentic workflows with integrated search, tool execution, and multi-model orchestration.

entry.title: Search API: Better Extraction, Dynamic Benchmarks
entry.content: Our Search API snippet quality has been optimized along two dimensions: relevance and size.

entry.title: Computer for Enterprise
entry.content: The enterprise-ready version of Computer orchestrates 20 advanced models to execute multi-step projects for businesses.

entry.title: Announcing Premium Sources
entry.content: Computer can now access select Statista, CB Insights, and PitchBook data directly as part of your research workflow.

entry.title: Perplexity Joins the NVIDIA Nemotron Coalition
entry.content: The NVIDIA Nemotron Coalition is a collaboration of AI labs working together to advance open models. Today we are announcing Perplexity is a founding member of this important initiative.

entry.title: Comet Enterprise is here
entry.content: Comet Enterprise is a secure, team-ready AI browser that boosts productivity with admin controls and CrowdStrike protection.

entry.title: Comet is Now Available on iOS
entry.content: Comet for iOS brings AI-powered browsing, instant answers, and seamless research to the iPhone.

entry.title: Introducing Perplexity Health
entry.content: Today we are launching Perplexity Health, a suite of connectors to your personal health data that allows for powerful personal uses of Perplexity Computer, providing accurate health information for the most important questions.

entry.title: Announcing the Secure Intelligence Institute
entry.content: Today we're launching the Secure Intelligence Institute (SII). The Secure Intelligence Institute is Perplexity's flagship research center for advancing security, privacy, and trust in frontier AI.

entry.title: Computer in Slack: From Shared Context to Finished Work
entry.content: Like many breakthrough technologies, Perplexity Computer began as an internal tool at Perplexity. Computer was born in the place where we do most of our work: Slack.

entry.title: Computer is Now Your Personal CFO
entry.content: Perplexity links to accounts through Plaid for personalized debt plans, retirement dashboards, and cash flow forecasts.

entry.title: How Perplexity Builds Accuracy into Frontier AI
entry.content: Our central focus has always been to build accuracy into frontier AI. For the first time, we’re sharing some of the technology behind how we do that.

entry.title: Computer in Teams is here
entry.content: Perplexity brings AI orchestration to Microsoft Teams for analysis, creation, and workflows where work happens
